iree_add_all_subdirs()

    backends
  SRCS
    "backends.cc"
  DEPS
    iree::hal
    iree::hal::cts2::util::registry
    iree::hal::drivers::local_sync::registration
  TESTONLY
  ALWAYSLINK
  PUBLIC
)

iree_hal_cts2_testdata(
  FORMAT_NAME
    llvm_cpu
  TARGET_DEVICE
    "local"
  IDENTIFIER
    "iree_cts_testdata_llvm_cpu"

    "local_sync"
  FORMAT_STRING
    [=["embedded-elf-" IREE_ARCH]=]

    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/runtime/src/iree/hal/cts2/testdata"

    "--iree-hal-local-target-device-backends=llvm-cpu"
    "--iree-llvmcpu-target-cpu=generic"
)

    vmvx

    "local"
